title: Lively Crisp Lebanese Chickpeas Ouzi
description: A peppery, dairy‑free‑friendly chickpea dish with crisp puff pastry and a zesty Tabasco kick, perfect for a crowd‑pleasing Middle Eastern meal.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a skillet over medium heat and sauté the onion until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 30 seconds until fragrant.
Stir in the chickpeas, smoked paprika, cumin, coriander, and sumac, cooking until the spices are evenly distributed, about 3 minutes.
Pour in the Tabasco sauce and lemon juice, season with salt and pepper, and simmer the mixture for 2 minutes before removing from heat.
Layer the puff pastry sheet on a parchment‑lined baking sheet and spread the chickpea mixture evenly over it, then fold the edges inward and roll the pastry loosely.
Bake in the preheated oven for 15 minutes until the pastry is puffed and golden brown.
Let the ouzi cool for 5 minutes, then sprinkle chopped parsley on top before serving.
